title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Kozuki Alliance, Unknown person #2, Killer, Queen, Unknown person #3 as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you're really gonna fight Kaido again, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah. You wanna come too?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you crazy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You saw what he did

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to my partner!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: I'm done with alliances.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I ain't Trustin' anyone any- more!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: KRSSHH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Just be happy I don't feel like

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: KILLIN' YA RIGHT HERE!

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.text: Let's go, killer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We're gonna get our friends back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're goin' our own way from now on!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: UDon inside the prisoner's mine

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A pirate?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That straw hat kid's a pirate?! Just like Kaido?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes, but no!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can we trust him?! He'll just betray us some- where down the line!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A pirate is the last person I'd take help from!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look! The sea is vast, and there are many different kinds of pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Speak to him, and you shall see for yourselves! He does not lie.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That man is the Keystone of our Plan to defeat Kaido!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Crap... some- thing's missing. These guys have regained their senses, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, how are we supposed to believe that y'all were actually sent here from 20 years ago?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Ria120, you've always just looked super old! I can't even tell if you've aged 20 years or not!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we're just straight up making fun of me now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where did straw hat go?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: TAMA... It's dangerous here... Why are you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, big bro.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But I'm glad you're okay!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Look at him! He's definitely not okay.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't touch him! I'm still working on finding an antibody.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bluffing that it "doesn't work on me"... If you'd just stayed put, I wouldn't have had to do all this! viruses hurt, don't they?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When will you learn that your actions have consequences?! apologize to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm sorry... it burts... help...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're a bit of an idiot, but you really are amazing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I could never do such a thing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the real idiot, okay? And you're a coward,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And a weaking, and a scaredy-cat. You're hope- less.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: silence, you rude fool! I won't stand to be insulted like that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Momo, if you hit him, you'll get the disease too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Let's go, silly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're the one

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They're waiting for out there!\\

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: GyaAAH! Quit it, dummy! You'll die!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 46 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
